plugins.name: sabai-calendar
plugins.description: Calendar assistant with Google Calendar integration. Manage events, schedule meetings, get daily briefings, and optimize your time.

plugins.name: sabai-conversion
plugins.description: Smart currency and timezone converter that learns your preferences.

plugins.name: sabai-attio
plugins.description: CRM assistant with Attio integration. Manage leads, prepare for meetings, track deals, and log activities.

plugins.name: sabai-discord
plugins.description: Discord assistant for server management, messaging, channel organization, and community engagement.

plugins.name: sabai-notion
plugins.description: Documentation workflow with Notion integration. Create, update, and sync documentation between your codebase and Notion pages.

plugins.name: sabai-gmail
plugins.description: Gmail assistant for email composition, inbox management, templates, and follow-up tracking.

plugins.name: sabai-granola
plugins.description: Meeting intelligence powered by Granola. Search meetings, get summaries, smart analysis by meeting type, and coaching on work patterns.

plugins.name: sabai-linear
plugins.description: Product Manager assistant with Linear integration. Create tickets, manage backlog, generate PRDs, and more.

plugins.name: sabai-sabai
plugins.description: Relax with some Thai vibes - plays a chill video when you need a break.

plugins.name: sabai-slack
plugins.description: Full-featured Slack integration for messaging, channels, and search.

plugins.name: sabai-sudoku
plugins.description: Play Sudoku in Claude with an interactive visual game board. Generate puzzles of varying difficulty, get hints, and track your progress.

plugins.name: sabai-harvest
plugins.description: Efficient Harvest time tracking for employees and contractors using hrvst-cli.

plugins.name: sabai-tella
plugins.description: Tella video workflow assistant with MCP integration for managing videos, playlists, and creating async video content.

plugins.name: sabai-recall
plugins.description: Meeting bot automation with Recall.ai. Create bots to join and record meetings, access recordings, transcripts, and participant data.

plugins.name: sabai-remotion
plugins.description: Remotion video production assistant for briefs, storyboards, composition plans, and render-ready implementation guidance.

plugins.name: sabai-xero
plugins.description: Xero accounting integration for invoice management, contacts, payments, and financial reports.

plugins.name: sabai-diagrams
plugins.description: Mermaid diagram generator with visual renderer for flowcharts, sequences, state diagrams, and Gantt charts.
